Its induction motor not only offers long-lasting performance but also operates quietly and requires less maintenance compared to conventional motors. The adjustable nozzle provides versatility allowing users to switch between different spray patterns for customized cleaning. Designed with user convenience in mind it includes an ergonomic handle for comfortable operation sturdy wheels for easy mobility and a durable hose for extended reach.
